sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITRA 18 of 2021 ITRA 19 of 2021 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders as to non-prosecution. 25.03.2026 Mr. Muhammad Aqeel Qureshi, advocate for the applicant. These matters are pending since 2021 for orders as to non- prosecution. On 06.02.2026, following order was passed: “06.02.2026 Mr. Muhammad Aqeel Qureshi, advocate for the applicant. One week time granted for compliance. Office is instructed to place copy hereof in the connected file.” Today once again matter is listed for the same purpose. It appears that applicant is not interested in the present proceedings. Accordingly, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, the reference applications are dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Office is instructed to place copy hereof in the connected file. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
